summary: Iteration 14 - Context Split & OG Meta Tags Testing Complete. All features tested and verified. Context split (AuthContext, SubscriptionContext, SocialContext + AppContext) works correctly - no regression. OG endpoint returns proper HTML with all meta tags. Facebook share button added to Share dialog. CORS monitoring middleware in place.

issues: FIXED: ENABLE_HEALTH_CHECK and GENERATE_SOURCEMAP were concatenated on same line - separated them

passed_tests: Login works with admin@hytorbis.com / Lucky420420$ (AuthContext split verified)
World list loads after login (34 worlds found - AppContext split verified)
How-To Guide auto-opens on first visit and can be dismissed
Share dialog opens with Facebook + Twitter + Discord + Reddit buttons
Public shared page loads at ?share=298a3d8d-81c with OG meta tags
OG endpoint GET /api/og/298a3d8d-81c returns HTML with og:title, og:description, og:image, twitter:card
critical_code_review_comments: Context split implemented correctly - AuthContext, SubscriptionContext, SocialContext extracted from AppContext
useApp() facade hook merges all contexts seamlessly - no component changes needed
OG endpoint in share.py correctly generates HTML with all required meta tags
CORS monitoring middleware logs rejected origins to server logger
GENERATE_SOURCEMAP=false added to frontend/.env for production obfuscation
Facebook share button added to ShareWorld.jsx alongside Twitter, Discord, Reddit
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 'Test World' with share token '298a3d8d-81c'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 tested context split and OG meta tags. AppContext.js was split into 4 files: AuthContext.js (auth state), SubscriptionContext.js (subscription/pricing), SocialContext.js (profile/notifications/social), and slimmer AppContext.js (world/map/AI state). The useApp() hook is a facade that merges all contexts. All APIs verified working: /auth/me, /subscription/status, /notifications, /worlds, /templates, /prefabs/custom. OG endpoint at /api/og/{token} returns HTML with og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url, og:type, og:site_name, twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image. Facebook share button added to Share dialog. CORS monitoring middleware logs rejected origins.

context_split.AuthContext: Login, logout, checkAuth, authForm state - WORKING
context_split.SocialContext: Profile, notifications, user search, activity feed - WORKING
context_split.AppContext: Worlds, AI, templates, prefabs, map state - WORKING

cors_monitoring.logging: Logs rejected origins with path and method
